prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training - high-endurance performance with carbohydrate loading and proper nutritional timing around a 2-hour morning run

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains exactly 3 meals and appropriate pre/during/post-workout nutrition timed around the morning run
Total daily caloric intake is appropriate for marathon training (approximately 3000-3500 calories for this athlete)
Carbohydrates comprise 55-65% of total calories with emphasis on complex carbs and strategic timing around training
Plan is presented in a compact, single-day format with clear meal times and portion sizes
task_description: Write a compact, consice 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high calorie intake and carbohydrate loading with specific nutritional timing around training

prompt_inputs.goal: Maximize muscle recovery and growth through optimized protein distribution and meal timing for strength training

solution_criteria: Meal plan includes 4-5 meals distributed throughout the day with protein at each meal
Total daily protein intake meets or exceeds 1.6-2.2g per kg of body weight (136-187g)
Meals are timed around training for optimal recovery and performance
Plan is compact and presented in a clear, easy-to-follow format
task_description: Write a compact, consice 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength/power athlete (weightlifter) requiring high protein intake and meal distribution optimized for muscle recovery and growth

prompt_inputs.goal: maintain performance energy and muscle recovery for soccer training and match play

solution_criteria: Includes 3+ meals/snacks with complete protein sources suitable for vegans
Provides adequate carbohydrates for soccer performance and recovery
Addresses key micronutrients (iron, B12, calcium) commonly deficient in vegan diets
Compact format presenting 1 day of meals in concise structure
task_description: Write a compact, consice 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport-specific dietary constraint (vegan soccer player) requiring complete protein sources and micronutrient balance while maintaining performance energy levels
